title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Michael Donovan introduced a website staging environment for review. Vinnie Micciche suggested refining AI messaging to focus on dealer outcomes, emphasizing human involvement and data governance. Key changes requested include reversing the "AI + Human" badge and renaming "Industry Insights" to "Resources and Dealer Insights." A process for revisions and rapid content updates was discussed.

decisions.description: Staging environment introduced for website content review and revision.
AI messaging to focus on dealer outcomes, not "human plus AI" feature.
Reverse "AI + Human" badge to "Human + AI" on the website.
Change "Industry Insights" to "Resources and Dealer Insights" for the blog.
Michael Donovan to set up mirrored file/theme for rapid content updates.
Michael Donovan to send staging environment link to Vinnie Micciche.
Michael Donovan to outline revision submission process for Vinnie Micciche.
Michael Donovan to update white-on-white text issue on staging environment.

actionItems.task: Send link to proposed staging environment website to Vinnie Micciche for review.
Outline how Vinnie Micciche should organize and submit revisions for the staged website.
Set up and send a file/theme for Vinnie Micciche to build into Lovable for content.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie can easily add content to website.

actionItems.task: Reverse the order of the badges on the website to display 'Human and AI'.
Update the page in the staging environment that currently has white-on-white text.
Change 'Industry Insights' to 'Resources and Dealer Insights' on the website.

tensions: Saturation of AI messaging in the market, making 'human plus AI' less effective.
Need for governance and supervision over AI tools to prevent hallucination and liability.
Existing website's quirky navigation and security issues.
referencesToPast: Conserver was built for establishing a 'system of truth' and governance.
Existing website had quirky issues with navigation and security that Michael Donovan has made progress in fixing.

contributions.description: Introduced staging environment for website content review.
Appreciated staging environment for iterative website development.
Suggested refining AI messaging to focus on dealer outcomes.
Stressed critical role of human involvement and data governance in AI.
Emphasized professionalism and certifications like Sock 2 for larger groups.
Requested reversing 'AI + Human' badge to 'Human + AI'.
Proposed changing 'Industry Insights' to 'Resources and Dealer Insights'.
Asked for a structured process for Vinnie to submit website revisions.
Agreed to set up mirrored file/theme for rapid content updates.
Emphasized need for easy, rapid website content iteration.
